title: Inuloides tomentosa
taxonomy: Inuloides tomentosa is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This classification suggests that Inuloides tomentosa is a member of the large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as daisies or sunflowers. Further classification indicates that it belongs to the genus Inuloides, which is a group of plants characterized by their unique characteristics. The full classification of Inuloides tomentosa is: Inuloides tomentosa ( genus: Inuloides, family: Asteraceae).
